title: Agarose Gel Electrophoresis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6q0qi","text":"The concentration of the agarose gel is 1%.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4sg0m","text":"Please wear gloves for the experiment, Be careful when heating, protect your hands.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 20 ml of TAE 1X. Need to prepare 1X TAE with 50X TAE.
Heat up until the solution is homogeneous.
Add 1 μl Gelred into solution and mix well.
Put the solution into bed for polymerize, make sure "comb" is well placed and the solution is balanced.
